text:
In a small town nestled among mountains, a girl named Lily loved butterflies. One sunny morning, she discovered a beautiful winged visitor in her garden. Curiosity piqued, Lily fluttered closer and watched in awe, learning about butterfly life. She even collected a few precious samples to study. Even though she couldnatedly flew them about the house.

Lily read a lot about butterflies, and when the moon was high, she'd watch the glimmering tips of their wings reflect the stars. She always wished she could spend the day with them, visiting far-off places. One rainy evening, curious after midnight, she followed a tiny trail of sparkling droplets that led down a stream.

After a playful hop, hop, she realized the trail led into a clearing where a field full of butterflies fluttered around leisurely. Seeing so many beautiful creatures made her heart sing.
